llm_items.context: For management reporting purposes, the Firm has three reportable business segments – Consumer & Community Banking (“CCB”), Commercial & Investment Bank (“CIB”) and Asset & Wealth Management (“AWM”)... CCB total net revenue was $76,029 million.
CIB total net revenue was $78,454 million for the year ended December 31, 2025.
AWM total net revenue was $24,073 million for the year ended December 31, 2025.
North America revenue was $139,689 million for the year ended December 31, 2025.
Europe/Middle East/Africa revenue was $24,478 million for the year ended December 31, 2025.
Asia-Pacific revenue was $14,065 million for the year ended December 31, 2025.
Latin America/Caribbean revenue was $4,215 million for the year ended December 31, 2025.

The Firm entered into a forward purchase commitment on December 30, 2025 to acquire the Apple credit card portfolio, with an expected closing in approximately 24 months (the “Apple Card transaction”). At December 31, 2025, includes estimated total credit exposure related to the Apple Card transaction at the time that the transaction is expected to close of approximately $104 billion.

As of December 31, 2025, the Firm had additional future operating lease commitments of $1.9 billion that were signed but had not yet commenced. These operating leases will commence between 2026 and 2029 with lease terms up to 21 years.
